title: Glass shower door framed with or without aluminium profiles (Tariff notice 13)
body: "A new Combined Nomenclature Explanatory Note was published on 27 March 2025.  Explanatory Notes to the Combined Nomenclature of the European Union  (C/2025/1923)  This is not considered a change in Northern Ireland practice.  Classification (Combined Nomenclature (CN) code)  7020 00 80  Reason  Pursuant to Article 9(1), point (a), of Council Regulation (EEC) No 2658/87, the Explanatory notes to the Combined Nomenclature of the European Union are amended as follows:  On page 289, point 3 of the Explanatory notes to Chapter 70, General, is replaced by the following:  ‘3. for doors (excluding glass shower doors of heading 7020), windows of buildings, etc. (headings 4418, 7610, etc.).’  On page 294, the following explanatory note is inserted:  ‘7020 00 80 Other’  This subheading includes all types of glass shower doors, panels or enclosures, including those with partially or fully framed sections. See also the HS classification opinions 7020 00/1 and 7020 00/2.  Contact details   Tariff ClassificationCustoms Policy & Strategy3rd Floor14 Westfield AvenueStratfordLondonE20 1HZ   Email: tariff.classification@hmrc.gov.uk  This Tariff notice is published for information purposes only.  "

taxons.title: UK Trade Tariff and classification of goods
